description: Set up the monorepo foundation: root configs, shared packages (auth, AI, shared-ui, common, database, realtime), TypeScript configs, and the project README with full architecture documentation. This is the foundation everything else builds on.
steps: Create root package.json with npm workspaces pointing to apps/* and packages/*
Create root tsconfig.json with strict TypeScript config and path aliases for all packages
Create packages/common/package.json and packages/common/tsconfig.json
Create packages/common/src/index.ts exporting all common utilities
Create packages/common/src/types.ts with shared TypeScript interfaces (User, Session, ApiResponse, PaginatedResult, etc.)
Create packages/common/src/constants.ts with ecosystem-wide constants (app names, API endpoints, event types)
Create packages/common/src/utils.ts with utility functions (formatDate, generateId, debounce, throttle, deepClone, etc.)
Create packages/common/src/validators.ts with validation helpers (email, phone, URL, etc.)
Create packages/database/package.json and packages/database/tsconfig.json
Create packages/database/src/index.ts exporting all database modules
Create packages/database/src/schemas/ with complete schemas for all 9 apps: users.ts, messages.ts, emails.ts, posts.ts, ads.ts, media.ts, profiles.ts, ai-sessions.ts, notifications.ts
Create packages/database/src/models/ with model classes for each schema with CRUD operations
Create packages/database/src/migrations/ with migration definitions
Create packages/auth/package.json and packages/auth/tsconfig.json
Create packages/auth/src/index.ts exporting all auth modules
Create packages/auth/src/providers/quantmail-provider.ts - QuantMail as central OAuth provider
Create packages/auth/src/providers/phone-provider.ts - Phone/SMS auth for QuantChat
Create packages/auth/src/middleware/auth-middleware.ts - Express middleware for token validation
Create packages/auth/src/services/token-service.ts - JWT token creation, validation, refresh
Create packages/auth/src/services/session-service.ts - Session management across all apps
Create packages/auth/src/types.ts - Auth-specific types
Create packages/ai/package.json and packages/ai/tsconfig.json
Create packages/ai/src/index.ts exporting all AI modules
Create packages/ai/src/core/engine.ts - Central AI engine class with inference, context management
Create packages/ai/src/core/context-manager.ts - Manages conversation context, memory
Create packages/ai/src/core/model-router.ts - Routes requests to appropriate AI models
Create packages/ai/src/services/chat-ai.ts - AI for QuantChat (smart replies, content moderation)
Create packages/ai/src/services/mail-ai.ts - AI for QuantMail (compose, summarize, categorize)
Create packages/ai/src/services/content-ai.ts - AI for content generation/moderation across apps
Create packages/ai/src/services/recommendation-ai.ts - AI recommendations (feed, videos, matches)
Create packages/ai/src/services/device-control-ai.ts - AI device control for QuantAI app
Create packages/ai/src/types.ts - AI-specific types and interfaces
Create packages/shared-ui/package.json and packages/shared-ui/tsconfig.json
Create packages/shared-ui/src/index.ts exporting all UI components
Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Button.tsx, Input.tsx, Modal.tsx, Avatar.tsx, Card.tsx, Badge.tsx, Tabs.tsx, Dropdown.tsx, Toast.tsx, Loader.tsx
Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/MediaPlayer.tsx, VideoPlayer.tsx, AudioPlayer.tsx, ImageViewer.tsx
Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Chat/ - ChatBubble.tsx, ChatInput.tsx, ChatList.tsx, TypingIndicator.tsx
Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Feed/ - FeedCard.tsx, FeedList.tsx, StoryRing.tsx, PostActions.tsx
Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Navigation/ - BottomNav.tsx, SideNav.tsx, TopBar.tsx, SearchBar.tsx
Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/AI/ - AIAssistant.tsx, AIChat.tsx, AISuggestion.tsx, AIOverlay.tsx
Create packages/shared-ui/src/hooks/ - useAuth.ts, useAI.ts, useRealtime.ts, useMedia.ts, useInfiniteScroll.ts, useTheme.ts
Create packages/shared-ui/src/themes/ - light.ts, dark.ts, neon.ts (brand themes)
Create packages/realtime/package.json and packages/realtime/tsconfig.json
Create packages/realtime/src/index.ts exporting realtime modules
Create packages/realtime/src/websocket-server.ts - WebSocket server implementation
Create packages/realtime/src/websocket-client.ts - WebSocket client for apps
Create packages/realtime/src/channels.ts - Channel/room management for real-time features
Create packages/realtime/src/events.ts - Event types and handlers for all real-time events
Create packages/realtime/src/presence.ts - Online presence tracking across ecosystem
Update README.md with comprehensive ecosystem architecture documentation
acceptance_criteria: Root package.json exists with workspaces config listing all apps and packages
All 6 shared packages (common, database, auth, ai, shared-ui, realtime) have complete source files
packages/auth/ implements QuantMail as central OAuth provider with phone auth support for QuantChat
packages/ai/ implements a central AI engine with service modules for each app domain
packages/database/ has complete schemas covering all 9 apps' data models
packages/shared-ui/ has reusable React components for common UI patterns
packages/realtime/ implements WebSocket infrastructure for real-time features
All TypeScript files have proper type annotations and exports
verification: Run: ls /projects/sandbox/Quant-Ecosystem/packages/ (verify all 6 package directories exist)
